analysis.summary: 2026世界杯1/16决赛及后续赛程分析：已完成的两场比赛挪威和法国顺利晋级；即将进行的比赛中英格兰、美国东道主优势明显，比利时与塞内加尔势均力敌，墨西哥主场迎战厄瓜多尔稍占上风。赔率市场清晰，伤病影响有限，需关注平局风险。

records.title: Reece James, Jarell Quansah out of England's World Cup clash with Congo DR
records.description: Thomas Tuchel has confirmed Reece James and Jarell Quansah will miss England's round of 32 clash with Congo DR on Wednesday.

records.title: Jordan Pickford: England 'ready to go to war' for Thomas Tuchel
records.description: England goalkeeper Jordan Pickford is in no doubt the players will be "ready to go to war" for manager Thomas Tuchel when they take on Congo DR for a place in the World Cup round of 16.
